title: Implement LiteLLM routing and error surfacing in serve.py

log.context: Implement LiteLLM routing and error surfacing in serve.py

Done. Here's a summary of what was implemented:

**Changes to `/mnt/data/hello-world/serve.py`:**

1. **`_call_llm(model, system_prompt, user_message, on_token)`** — new unified dispatch function:
   - `grok-*` or `xai/*` → `_call_grok` (xAI API)
   - `gemini-*` or `google/*` → `_call_gemini_cli_with_model` (Gemini CLI subprocess with `-m` flag)
   - `claude-*` or anything else → `_call_claude` (Anthropic)
   - Wraps all exceptions in a `RuntimeError("[model] ExceptionType: message")` — no silen...(truncated)
